meaning: 阿鲁巴岛[拉丁美洲](荷属安的列斯群岛中的大岛)
examples: Oil comes from Trinidad, Aruba and Curacao.
A tourist in Aruba discovered a jawbone last week.
In this case, they establish two file locations in the Aruba asset registry.
The Netherlands, the Netherlands Antilles, and Aruba are equal partners in the Dutch Kingdom.
From Aruba to Zermatt, teachers, doctors, nurses, electricians and plumbers are always in demand.
